mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (merchant_id, customer_id, payment_id, status, total, currency, notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{customerId}, #{paymentId}, #{status}::order_status, #{total}, #{currency}, #{notes}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
status = #{status}::order_status,
total = #{total},
currency = #{currency},
notes = #{notes},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
WHERE id = #{id}
